name: gh-address-cr
description: Deterministic PR review-resolution control plane for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Resolve PR review threads with evidence and a final gate.
interface.longDescription: Packages the gh-address-cr skill for Codex. The skill delegates state, GitHub side effects, leases, evidence, and final-gate checks to the deterministic gh-address-cr runtime CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use GH Address CR to handle this PR review.
Run final-gate proof for this pull request.
Resolve stale PR review threads safely.
